Storefront.hosting_partner_desc: Set up your own infrastructure with Hostinger before launch and get a 20% discount with referral code DAGANGOS.
Storefront.cta_title: Ready to power your digital agency?
Storefront.cta_subtitle: Claim your domain, customize your brand identity, and launch responsive pages with DagangOS today.
Storefront.about_subtitle: We build modular, plug-and-play digital infrastructure that helps Indonesian businesses scale from local to global, seamlessly.
Storefront.mission_text: We believe that every Indonesian business, regardless of size, deserves access to world-class digital tools. Our mission is to bridge the technology gap by providing modular, affordable, and scalable systems.
Storefront.vision_text: We envision a unified digital ecosystem where commerce, operations, and intelligence flow seamlessly—enabling Indonesian brands to compete and win on the global stage.
Storefront.val_1: Innovation & Simplicity - Complex technology made easy to use
Storefront.val_2: Modular Scalability - Grow at your own pace
Storefront.val_3: Customer Success - Your growth is our growth
Storefront.val_4: Security First - Protecting your data natively
Storefront.subject: Subject
Storefront.footer_desc: Empowering Indonesian businesses with enterprise-grade digital commerce solutions. Built for scale, designed for growth.
Storefront.plans_subtitle: One-time self-hosted digital business platforms designed for Indonesian enterprises.
